intro: Arachnothryx myriantha is a shrub-like plant native to Mexico, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, offering various health benefits such as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which aid in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin infections.
